title: Develop solutions that use Azure Cosmos DB
summary: Learn how to create Azure Cosmos DB resources with the appropriate consistency levels, and perform data operations by using the .NET SDK V3 for Azure Cosmos DB.

sections.title: Develop solutions that use Azure Cosmos DB
sections.summary: Learn how to create Azure Cosmos DB resources with the appropriate consistency levels, and perform data operations by using the .NET SDK V3 for Azure Cosmos DB.

lessons.title: Explore Azure Cosmos DB
lessons.content_md:
Learn the core features and functionality of Azure Cosmos DB.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/explore-azure-cosmos-db/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Work with Azure Cosmos DB
lessons.content_md:
Work with Azure Cosmos DB

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/work-with-cosmos-db/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Develop solutions that use Azure Cosmos DB
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Develop solutions that use Azure Cosmos DB**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
